# LPD-Net: 3D Point Cloud Learning for Large-Scale Place Recognition and Environment Analysis

- **Work ID:** `LPR-088`

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** modified Oxford RobotCar, In-house University Sector (U.S.), In-house Residential Area (R.A.), In-house Business District (B.D.), RobotCar Seasons — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5–8, § 4. Experiments;4.1 Place Recognition Results;4.3 Comparison with image-based methods, Table 4;Table 8
- **input_unit:** single point-cloud submap randomly downsampled to 4096 points and normalized to \[-1,1\] — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5, § 4. Experiments
- **invariances:** point-order permutation — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–7, § 3.1 Network Architecture;3.2.1 Feature Network Structure;4.2 Robustness Test, Fig. 2;Fig. 9
- **representation:** 10-D adaptive local geometric features, feature-space and Cartesian-space graph aggregation, NetVLAD, 256-D global descriptor, lazy quadruplet loss — `source_fact`; manual, p. 3–6, § 3.1 Network Architecture;3.2 Adaptive Local Feature Extraction;3.3 Graph-based Neighborhood Aggregation, Fig. 2-6;Table 1
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–3, § Abstract;3.1 Network Architecture, Fig. 2
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 2–6, § 3. Network Design;4.1 Place Recognition Results, Fig. 2

> Information types distinguish author-reported facts, derived facts, researcher judgements, and agent inferences. The locator identifies the reviewed source; verbatim evidence remains in the private audit store.
